justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the day after tomorrow" as Wednesday, June 3rd, and subsequent time adjustments were also understood accurately.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives by checking slightly later times on the same day and then suggesting the next day, which led to a successful booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed information and made appropriate API calls without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent offering clear alternatives when initial requests were unavailable.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context and expanded the search intelligently by suggesting checking other times on the same day and then a different day when the initial request was unavailable.
